title: Bryce's Better Creepers
description: A great Resource Pack that adds a much needed update to the Creeper Texture, Its a mix of the Minecraft Dungeons and Base game texture
body: This mod gives the old Creeper a much-needed visual upgrade. The long-time default texture has been lurking for more than 15 years now, and while it's familiar, it definitely shows its age. This remake takes the Creeper and reworks it by blending aspects of the old with the more detailed and refined Minecraft Dungeons look. The result is an authentic, yet enhanced texture that preserves the Creeper immediately recognizable while making it feel more alive, menacing, and relevant to the modern standards of graphics.
